productDisplayName: Nike Men's Celso Solarsoft Thong Blue Flip Flop
description: Usher in the summer with these uber cool Celso Solarsoft Thong flip flops from nike. The soft ridged footbed lends itself to maximum comfort and the lightly ridged soles offer light grip. Perfect for a day out at the beach or poolside. Simply team them with casuals and pamper your feet with a pleasure called comfort.UpperThong straps in soft thermoplastic rubber  for extended durabilityRubber toe separator with small ridges to avoid blistering between the toesThong strap with rubber panel embedded brand mark for styleReplaceable thong straps inserted into the outsole through the midsoleMidsoleSolarSoft foam at midsole with grooves for airflow and drainageRidged footbed for maximum acupressure comfortSqueezable footbed offering ultimate lightweight feelOutsoleMade of 1mm thick water-proof and tear resistant premium silicone skinFirm SolarSoft foam at outsole for durability and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlighte in direct sunlight
